$comment: Single source of truth for the (pipeline_id/phase) -> skill registry. Consumed today by src/test/phase-skill-coverage.test.ts; consumed later by the monitor runtime (BACK-660) for dispatch-time skill injection. Do NOT create a second manifest/registry file — edit this one. Entries are additive: BACK-657.2/.3/.4 each append their own phase's entry. BACK-686.2 added `kind` to every entry: `skill` (dispatch spawns a fresh session), `script` (a mechanical in-tick function call, never dispatched), `gate` (a mechanical check runs first; only escalates to a skill dispatch on the non-trivial path).
